name: Caraway-Sour Cream Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the water and 1/2 teaspoon salt to boiling.
2. Add cabbage and onion; cook, covered, until crisp-tender, about 7 to 8 minutes.
3. Drain, reserving cooking liquid.
4. Add enough water to cooking liquid to make 3/4 cup.
5. In the same saucepan, blend together sour cream, flour, mustard, caraway seed, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and pepper.
6. Stir in cooking liquid.
7. Fold in cabbage and onion.
8. Turn mixture into a 1-1/2-quart casserole.
9. Bake covered at 350 until heated through, about 20 minutes, stirring once.
10. Sprinkle generously with paprika.
